posts.author: MathijsKok (mkok)
posts.cookedHtml:
Testing our Monday (and liking it) but there is one thing I need that I could not find, perhaps some kind soul is able to point out how to go forward?

I need a column that shows the progress of a project based on a percentage that is inserted by the developer. So when he enters 50% the column should show a bar that is 50% filled.

Thanks in advance,

Mathijs
